title: ABB Robotics 在 F712 自动叉车中配备 vSLAM 导航
summary: The Flexley Stacy F712 forklift uses vision to navigate, works with other robots, and complies with safety standards, says ABB Robotics. The post ABB Robotics includes vSLAM navigation in F712 autonomous forklift appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：ABB Robotics includes vSLAM navigation in F712 autonomous forklift）
